calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Bridget Golbert, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Attorneys, Arnold Walter Evje and Cindy Lee, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Faapio Matau is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Cindy Lee advices the Court the defendant vacated the premises. The Court instructs counsel to file a dismissal. The settlement conference is off calendar and the trial date of October 22, 2007 is ordered vacated.
